content.content: Plan: validate the full Work Unit, inspect the two skills, metadata, active references, tests, and dedicated Git execution context.
Work: add a focused failing ownership contract test, then make the minimum skill and metadata edits required to pass it.
AI Review: inspect the diff for duplicated fact ownership, broken routing, changed names or paths, and scope expansion.
Report: register verification and review evidence, prepare the Human checklist and review method, and leave approval and merge decisions to the Human.
